State Licensing Reference
About

Healthcare Licensing Requirements by State

Find licensing requirements, fees, timelines, and reciprocity rules for therapists, dietitians, pharmacists, and more — organized by state.

Specialties

Dietitian & Nutritionist RDN (Registered Dietitian Nutritionist) Occupational Therapist OTR (Occupational Therapist Registered) Physical Therapist PT (Licensed Physical Therapist) Respiratory Therapist RRT (Registered Respiratory Therapist) Speech-Language Pathologist CCC-SLP (Certificate of Clinical Competence) Audiologist AuD (Doctor of Audiology) Pharmacy Technician CPhT (Certified Pharmacy Technician) Pharmacist RPh (Registered Pharmacist)

About This Hub

State Licensing Reference is an independent reference for state licensing requirements across the United States.

Updated • 2026-03-22
